summary: Added PLAN records for governed improvement. The self-model layer now validates PLAN records, includes a seed PLAN-20260705-0001 for GAP-0001 read-only L0 candidate diagnostics, provides scripts/write_plan_record.py, and includes plans/open_plans/plan_counts in generated SELF_MODEL.json. The index audit was refined so source-record changes that still match a normalized rebuild are reported as content-current rather than stale. Focused self-model tests passed with 22 tests and the full suite passed with 291 tests before commit.
